_doc: Editable source-of-truth for each provider's OFFICIAL model page + pricing page. The sync-provider-pricing skill WebFetches these to extract models and prices — it never guesses. Two URL lists per provider: models_urls (the model catalog/spec page: context window, modalities, deprecation status) and pricing_urls ($/MTok). When a fetch 404s, redirects cross-host, or returns stale content, WebSearch '<provider> api pricing' / '<provider> models', confirm the canonical vendor page, and UPDATE the entry here + bump verified_date. This file is the skill's mutable knob; skill.md is the fixed procedure. URL set last refreshed 2026-06-03 from a Claude.ai link scrape — treat as starting points, verify on use.
_cache_field_mapping: Model table has ONE cachedInputWritePricePerMillion (provider's STANDARD/short cache-write price) and ONE cachedInputReadPricePerMillion (cache hit/read). Anthropic: write = 5-minute cache write (1.25x input); 1-hour write (2x) NOT stored; read = 0.1x input. Others per cache_convention below. seed.ts holds FALLBACK multipliers (input x mult) used only when a price is NULL; prefer the explicit official value in the template JSON. Non-chat models (embedding/image/audio) have no prompt cache -> cache fields NULL. NULL-PRICE TRAP: cache/layer/pricing.go defaults cache-read price to FULL input when cachedInputReadPricePerMillion is NULL, so a CHAT model with NULL cache_read overcharges cache hits at full input -> always set explicit cache_read on chat models.
_code_verification: Per skill.md Step 3b, every per-provider audit ALSO verifies adapter CODE support, not just price values: (1) THINKING/REASONING — request enable reaches wire (reasoning_effort / gemini thinkingConfig / nexus.ext.anthropic.thinking; anchors estimator/reasoning.go, specs/gemini/codec, specs/openai/responses), response keeps reasoning_content separate from answer (non-stream + delta.reasoning_content->ReasoningDelta; anchor transport/normalize/codecs/openai_chat.go + per-adapter coverage_test.go), and unsupported-param strip ONLY on observed 400 (pattern specs/compat/moonshot/rewrites.go). Known gaps: DeepSeek has no temperature strip + absent from estimator/output_budget.go; Minimax/Xai no thinking. (2) PROMPT CACHE — token classification shared/traffic/adapters/api/<provider>/detect.go, no-double-bill cost formula internal/ingress/proxy/proxy_cachecost.go; only Anthropic has a cache-write surcharge.

anthropic.cache_convention: cachedInputWrite = 5m cache write = 1.25x input. cachedInputRead = cache hit = 0.10x input. 1h write (2x) not stored. seed.ts mult: read 0.10 / write 1.25.
anthropic.notes: Pricing FETCHED & CONFIRMED 2026-06-03. Opus 4.7+ new tokenizer. inference_geo=us adds 1.1x (not modeled). Official models: Opus 4.8/4.7/4.6/4.5/4.1, Opus 4 (deprecated); Sonnet 4.6/4.5, Sonnet 4 (deprecated); Haiku 4.5, Haiku 3.5 (retired except Bedrock/Vertex).

openai.cache_convention: No cache-WRITE surcharge (automatic prompt caching is free to write) -> cachedInputWrite = 0. cachedInputRead = cache hit, PER-MODEL (~0.25x-0.50x input) -> READ THE OFFICIAL VALUE, never a flat number. seed.ts mult: read 0.50 / write 0.00 (fallback only).
openai.notes: KNOWN BUG: prod has cachedInputRead=1.25 flat on nearly every OpenAI model — EXCEEDS input for o3-mini/o4-mini/gpt-5.4-mini/gpt-5.4-nano (impossible), nonsensical on embeddings/whisper/dall-e. Replace with official per-model cached-input prices; NULL cache fields for non-chat. gpt-4-turbo already status=deprecated replacedBy=gpt-4o.

google-gemini.cache_convention: Implicit caching: no write surcharge -> cachedInputWrite = 0. cachedInputRead = cached-content/hit price (~0.25x input; 2.5 Pro tiered by context length >200k). seed.ts mult: read 0.25 / write 0.00 (fallback). Embedding models: read NULL.
google-gemini.notes: gemini-2.5-pro tiered (<=200k vs >200k). gemini-embedding-001 prod cachedInputRead 0.31 is meaningless -> NULL.

deepseek.cache_convention: Prices as cache-HIT vs cache-MISS input (not a write surcharge) -> cachedInputWrite = 0; cachedInputRead = cache-hit input price. seed.ts mult: read 0.10 / write 0.00 (fallback). Off-peak discount windows not modeled.
deepseek.notes: Confirm deepseek-v4-pro/flash map to which DeepSeek SKU/tier; prod input 0.435/0.14 are custom.

moonshot.cache_convention: Per-SKU cache pricing (8k/32k/128k differ). cachedInputWrite = context-cache write price if published else 0; cachedInputRead = cache-hit price. seed.ts mult: read 0.50 / write 0.00 (DEFAULT approximation only — no uniform ratio; prefer exact per-SKU official values).
moonshot.notes: Kimi rebrand: models live under platform.kimi.ai (CN: platform.moonshot.cn). prod flat cw=0.84/cr=0.084 across kimi-k2.5/k2.6/128k despite different inputs — almost certainly wrong; read official per-SKU.

azure-openai.notes: NOT configured in prod (template-only). Model catalog via ai.azure.com (Microsoft Learn).

bedrock.cache_convention: Per-model (Anthropic-on-Bedrock follows Anthropic ratios; others vary).

cohere.cache_convention: No published prompt-cache tiers -> write 0, read NULL unless documented.

fireworks.cache_convention: Per-model serverless token pricing; cache rarely separate -> read NULL unless documented.

glm.cache_convention: Zhipu GLM publishes cache-hit pricing on some SKUs; read official.
glm.notes: NOT configured in prod (template-only). Z.ai intl / open.bigmodel.cn CN.

groq.cache_convention: Token pricing only; no prompt cache -> write 0, read NULL.

huggingface.cache_convention: Routed to underlying providers; pricing passes through -> read NULL unless documented.

minimax.cache_convention: Read official; MiniMax publishes per-model token prices.

mistral.cache_convention: Token pricing; no standard prompt-cache surcharge -> write 0, read NULL unless documented.

perplexity.cache_convention: Per-model token + per-request search fee; no prompt cache -> write 0, read NULL.

replicate.cache_convention: Often per-second hardware billing, not per-token; map carefully -> read NULL.

together.cache_convention: Per-model token pricing; no standard prompt-cache surcharge -> write 0, read NULL unless documented.

vertex.cache_convention: Gemini-on-Vertex follows Gemini ratios; Claude-on-Vertex follows Anthropic; context-caching priced separately. Regional/multi-region endpoints +10%.

xai.cache_convention: Grok publishes cached-input price on some models; read official (model page includes pricing).
xai.notes: NOT configured in prod (template-only). docs.x.ai model page embeds pricing.
